metadata.description: Undercurrent Holdings skill marketplace for Claude Code. Forked from sam-dumont/claude-skills.

plugins.name: sams-voice
plugins.description: Apply Sam Dumont's personal writing voice and style when drafting any written content. Works in English and French.

plugins.name: sams-architecture
plugins.description: Codifies Sam's mature architectural patterns for Python APIs, infrastructure/DevOps, Garmin/embedded systems, and frontend projects. Enforces Service→Repository→Database pattern, 80% test coverage, comprehensive CI/CD, and zero-tolerance security standards.

plugins.name: outcome-engineering
plugins.description: Reframes tasks as measurable outcomes using o16g principles. Adds outcome specification, execution guardrails, and validation to any workflow.

plugins.name: technical-blog-post
plugins.description: Process skill for turning raw project data into structured technical blog posts. Covers gathering, extraction, structure, and Astro frontmatter.

plugins.name: sketch-checker
plugins.description: Research whether a metal band has ties to far-right, NSBM, or fascist movements. Uses parallel research agents with tiered verdicts for both historical and current status.
